calendar.matters: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Document Production
Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiff?S Testimony

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-02-2026 Set For Trial On Oct-12-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-20-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (by Zoom):
Antony Tung, Esq. 626-416-4668 Tung & Associates for Plaintiff.
Brook Dooley, Esq. 415-391-5400 Keker Van Nest & Peters for Defendant FARALLON CAPITAL MANAGEMENT, LLC (In-person)
Court reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR #10619, 925-381-5000/925-954-9888, raquel@transcriptlegal.com

ARGUED. Mr. Dooley presents argument on assumption of the risk, judicial notice of facts in 2/22 email, failure to state a claim, question of foreseeability, Rowland case, insurability factor. Mr Tung agrees with the TR. Court comments. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT FARALLON CAPITAL MANAGEMENT, LLC DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Defendant Farallon Capital Management, LLC's Demurrer to Plaintiff Yuqi Lin's Complaint.

Taken Under Submission.***
